body_txt: Positive emotions and virtues like love and gratitude usually are not physical concepts. You can't see them; you can't feel them. But they are now! These objects are materialized out of good feelings. Whether they power you up, you need to collect a bunch of them for some purpose, or they make a weapon for you to use, they are physical manifestations of goodness. On occasion, you may find a living being made of it. Conceptually similar to things made of Pure Energy . Compare Care-Bear Stare , which is instead an attack, not object, of positive emotion. A weapon made of this may overlap with Holy Hand Grenade and/or Silver Has Mystic Powers . If the object represents a certain virtue, it's an Embodiment of Virtue . Not to be confused with Incorruptible Pure Pureness where a hero consciously chooses to be incorruptible like a morally inverted Complete Monster . Contrast, obviously, Made of Evil . See also God of Good .
